attributes.description: Settled spend (cost_gate commit) summed over time
attributes.title: Actual Spend Over Time
attributes.visState: {"type": "area", "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "sum", "schema": "metric", "params": {"field": "actual_cost_usd", "customLabel": "Actual spend (USD)"}}, {"id": "2", "enabled": true, "type": "date_histogram", "schema": "segment", "params": {"field": "@timestamp", "interval": "auto", "min_doc_count": 1}}], "params": {"addTooltip": true, "addLegend": true, "legendPosition": "right"}, "title": "Actual Spend Over Time"}

attributes.description: Settled spend attributed to each budget role
attributes.title: Spend by Budget Role
attributes.visState: {"type": "pie", "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "sum", "schema": "metric", "params": {"field": "actual_cost_usd", "customLabel": "Actual spend (USD)"}}, {"id": "2", "enabled": true, "type": "terms", "schema": "segment", "params": {"field": "role", "size": 12, "order": "desc", "orderBy": "1"}}], "params": {"addTooltip": true, "addLegend": true, "legendPosition": "right", "isDonut": true}, "title": "Spend by Budget Role"}

attributes.description: Event counts across the cost_gate reservation lifecycle; refund rate = refunded / reserved
attributes.title: Reserve / Commit / Refund Funnel
attributes.visState: {"type": "histogram", "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "count", "schema": "metric", "params": {"customLabel": "Events"}}, {"id": "2", "enabled": true, "type": "terms", "schema": "segment", "params": {"field": "event_type", "size": 5, "order": "desc", "orderBy": "1"}}], "params": {"addTooltip": true, "addLegend": true, "legendPosition": "right"}, "title": "Reserve / Commit / Refund Funnel"}

attributes.description: Sum of (actual - reserved); negative = over-estimate refunded on commit
attributes.title: Net Settlement Delta Over Time
attributes.visState: {"type": "line", "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "sum", "schema": "metric", "params": {"field": "delta_usd", "customLabel": "Net delta (USD)"}}, {"id": "2", "enabled": true, "type": "date_histogram", "schema": "segment", "params": {"field": "@timestamp", "interval": "auto", "min_doc_count": 1}}], "params": {"addTooltip": true, "addLegend": true, "legendPosition": "right"}, "title": "Net Settlement Delta Over Time"}

attributes.description: litellm_request_budget_denied events over time, grouped by budget role
attributes.title: Budget Denials
attributes.visState: {"type": "line", "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "count", "schema": "metric", "params": {"customLabel": "Denials"}}, {"id": "2", "enabled": true, "type": "date_histogram", "schema": "segment", "params": {"field": "@timestamp", "interval": "auto", "min_doc_count": 1}}, {"id": "3", "enabled": true, "type": "terms", "schema": "group", "params": {"field": "budget_role", "size": 8, "order": "desc", "orderBy": "1"}}], "params": {"addTooltip": true, "addLegend": true, "legendPosition": "right"}, "title": "Budget Denials"}

attributes.title: Top Sessions by Model Spend
attributes.visState: {"type": "table", "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "sum", "schema": "metric", "params": {"field": "cost_usd", "customLabel": "Total spend (USD)"}}, {"id": "2", "enabled": true, "type": "terms", "schema": "bucket", "params": {"field": "session_id", "size": 15, "order": "desc", "orderBy": "1"}}], "params": {"perPage": 10, "showPartialRows": false, "showMetricsAtAllLevels": false}, "title": "Top Sessions by Model Spend"}

attributes.description: cost_gate / ADR-0065 reserve-commit-refund spend, budget-role attribution, and denials
attributes.title: Cost & Budget
